title: 32-Language Support Across the ZX Series
content: At BarkinMad Studios, one of our goals is to make retro gaming accessible to players around the world. While the ZX Series takes inspiration from classic 1980s gaming, modern mobile gaming is a global experience, and players expect games to support their preferred language.

That's why every game in the ZX Series includes support for 32 languages. Whether you're playing ZXSnake, ZXBrick, ZXSpace, or future titles currently in development, localisation is built in from the very beginning.

Language support extends beyond the game itself. Menus, achievements, Game Center content, App Store listings, instructions, and future updates are all translated to help create a consistent experience for players worldwide.

Supporting multiple languages allows players to enjoy the games more comfortably and removes barriers that might otherwise prevent someone from fully understanding gameplay features, achievements, or progression systems.

The ZX Series currently supports players across Europe, North America, South America, Asia, and many other regions. Languages include English, French, German, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Dutch, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, Finnish, Polish, Czech, Turkish, Arabic, and many more.

Localisation has become a core part of the development process. New features, achievements, and content updates are designed with multi-language support in mind from day one rather than being added later.

While the games may be inspired by the golden age of arcade gaming, players today expect a modern experience. Supporting 32 languages helps ensure that retro-inspired gameplay can be enjoyed by as many people as possible.
As the ZX Series continues to grow, BarkinMad Studios remains committed to expanding and maintaining language support so players everywhere can enjoy classic arcade action in their own language.
